user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter new joinees by status, so that I can track joining formalities that are pending, in progress, or completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the New Joinees screen; When I select a status such as Pending initiation, In Progress, or Completed; Then only matching joinees are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter new joinees by joining period and department, so that I can focus on a specific intake or team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the New Joinees screen; When I set a joining period and select a department; Then only matching joinees are shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to complete joining formalities tasks for a candidate via the Task column, so that the joinee is onboarded
acceptance_criteria: Given a joinee has pending joining formalities; When I open its Task and complete the steps; Then the status advances toward Completed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see candidate and employee details including date of joining and department, so that I can verify each joinee's records
acceptance_criteria: Given joinees are listed; When I view a row; Then I can see candidate name, department and position level, employee code, date of joining, and employee department and position level

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the new joinees list, so that I can refine or clear my query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then matching records are displayed; And clicking Reset clears the filters
